task_completion.description: Verify that the agent connects to CoppeliaSim via the ZMQ Remote API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing a script executing and successfully connecting to CoppeliaSim on port 23000, or the CoppeliaSim GUI open while a script is running.

task_completion.description: Verify the script defines at least 6 target waypoints and logic to test at least 5 different orderings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing a Python script with an array/list of at least 6 target coordinates and a loop or permutation logic designed to test at least 5 different sequences.

task_completion.description: Verify the script executes the sequences and measures motion time and travel distance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the progress of the robot executing multiple sequences, printing out times and distances for each sequence, or visual movement of the robot arm in the CoppeliaSim GUI.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and formatting of the visit_sequences.csv file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/visit_sequences.csv is shown in an editor or terminal (via cat/head), containing the exact columns: sequence_id, visit_order, total_time_s, total_distance_m, and at least 5 rows of sequence data.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and formatting of the sequencing_report.json file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sequencing_report.json is shown in an editor or terminal, containing the keys: num_targets (value >= 6), num_sequences_tested (value >= 5), best_sequence_id, best_time_s, worst_time_s, improvement_pct, and target_positions.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the CoppeliaSim API to generate the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must write and execute a script importing the ZMQ Remote API to control the robot, rather than manually typing out fake CSV/JSON files in a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the sequence results are genuinely measured and not placeholder data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The total_time_s and total_distance_m values in the CSV should vary across different sequences, reflecting actual physical differences in the robot's travel path.

integrity.description: Ensure the summary statistics in the JSON report are dynamically calculated.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script should contain logic to calculate best_time_s, worst_time_s, and improvement_pct from the simulation results, rather than hardcoding arbitrary numbers into the JSON export.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task strictly requires at least 6 target waypoints (separated by min 0.04m, spanning min 0.15m max distance) and at least 5 tested sequences. The expected output paths are exactly /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/visit_sequences.csv and /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/sequencing_report.json.
